decisions.summary: Switch all non-Anthropic providers (kimi, minimax, zai, mimo, openrouter) from direct to claudish routing to fix 502 unknown provider errors in Claude Code v2.1.121
Claudish forwards unrecognized flags (--agent, --name) to Claude Code, so agent definitions (hooks, tools) continue to work for non-Anthropic models
Use explicit provider prefixes (kimi@, mm@, zai@, or@) and custom URL for mimo to ensure reliable claudish routing

hazards.summary: Claudish auto-detection misses some model variants (e.g. K2.6-code-preview as native-anthropic)
hazards.mitigation: Explicit prefixes in getClaudishPrefix for all known models

hazards.summary: Mimo custom URL syntax in claudish is experimental
hazards.mitigation: Base URL hardcoded to match providers.ts; probe verified claudish parses it correctly

resumePoint.description: Implementing bead workspace-0loo (update claudish prefix routing) — agents.ts updated. Next: update frontend provider compatibility badges.

sessionHistory.note: Started implementation of PAN-964. No prior continue file. Creating beads and implementing fix for non-Anthropic model routing.
